summary: PASS: exact Revision 30 candidate identity, contained release gates, 119 checker cases, 133 focused regressions, 370 canonical tests, committed V11 evidence replay, package dry run, installed consumer, and post-gate source reauthentication all succeeded.

artifacts.name: release-gate-evidence.md
artifacts.content:
# Revision 30 Release Gate Evidence (attempt 30b)

## Identity

- Agent: agent.6dad2f7ca99d372fe3e35407a04133b48c9be6feccb4891ce0add91474a619a8
- Blueprint: sha256:41b2bb9ebd0273d17856c90a7f46220cfafa6aff4585f020aa403ca541f55347
- Candidate compilation: sha256:ced8186898ebb27bac53e50e6b803c353766ae015464a2bae2b758cb6cf6cc36
- Candidate package: sha256:ddb642a474815b4ded464b40f5bd8225a404f610d3bd4a91d0ab2d43dc695f43
- Goal: v11.specialist-compiler.release revision 30
- Workspace: C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24
- Branch/HEAD: codex/v11-r24-recovery at e3ca469cb93406ec8d11086e0b134b8064d7424f

## Authenticated Inputs

- Before canonical execution, all 34 blueprint-declared context sources matched their exact byte counts and raw SHA-256 digests: 34/34, zero mismatches.
- The only semantic dependency handoff used was docs/specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/handoffs/prepare-candidate-pass-attempt-30.json: 14,494 bytes, raw sha256:3d855d14bffe913bb9c6bc93c97a202d0ea236af17826ebdcef0013cd4d04435, PASS. Its artifact authenticates 53/53 producer-declared candidate sources.
- The only machine fan-in used was docs/specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/handoffs/fan-in-release-attempt-30.json: 1,388 bytes, raw sha256:a81dd130fff8edbe90542162b9582792b29343a38d9eec49d438675d2120801e. It reports integrationReady=true, no missing dependency, and dependency semantic digest sha256:535bdb094d1b10a43e2a59de2e3c0180be92a6e808f4de8ed17f574487bab3b1.
- After all gates, all 34 context sources and both bound dependency files were rehashed: 36/36 exact byte-and-digest matches, zero mismatches.
- In-memory renderSpecialistPackage and verifySpecialistPackage reconstructed 9 package files and verified the exact candidate compilation/package pair with zero diagnostics. The reconstructed blueprint retained the exact agent ID, blueprint digest, and goal revision 30.

## Containment

- TEMP and TMP were bound to C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache\tmp, except that the Windows checker matrix used its verified short spelling.
- npm_config_cache was C:\tmp\swecircuit-v11-r24\.local\npm-cache; npm_config_offline=true; audit, fund, and update notifier were disabled.
- A Node child reported the exact long TEMP, TMP, cache, and npm flags. The checker child reported TEMP=TMP=C:\tmp\SWECIR~2\LOCAL~1\NPM-CA~1\tmp and the same long npm cache.
- PowerShell COM Scripting.FileSystemObject alone produced the short spelling. COM returned the same short file path for a nonce addressed through long and short spellings. Distinct long-to-short and short-to-long writes both cross-read correctly; final long/short SHA-256 values were identical: b16b3d670339a2f9257addf61209ec787ecadd7464ccb966e575447ec3393854.
- Only git, node, npm.cmd, and powershell were directly invoked. No network operation was requested; npm gates ran offline.
- Writes were limited to dist/** and .local/npm-cache/**. Exact-scope host escalation was used only after sandbox denial of those declared writes.

## Canonical Gates

| Exact command | Exit | Evidence |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-template.ps1 | 0 | Template check passed. |
| powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\test-check-template.ps1 | 0 | Full Windows negative matrix passed: 119/119 cases, concurrency 4, using verified short TEMP/TMP. |
| npm.cmd run build --silent | 0 | TypeScript build completed with no diagnostics. |
| node --test test/json-kernel.test.mjs test/project-validation.test.mjs test/specialist-schema.test.mjs test/specialist-compiler.test.mjs test/specialist-first-run.test.mjs test/specialist-handoff.test.mjs test/v11-dogfood-runner.test.mjs | 0 | Focused strict JSON, path, schema, compiler, first-run, handoff, and runner regressions passed: 133/133; fail 0, skipped 0. |
| npm.cmd run verify | 0 | Format checked 77 files; lint checked 64 files; typecheck passed; 370/370 tests passed; first-run example passed; V10 and V11 dogfood passed; embedded package and consumer gates passed. |
| npm.cmd run pack:check | 0 | Standalone dry run passed: swecircuit-0.0.0.tgz, 114 files, 134.9 kB packed, 754.7 kB unpacked, shasum 95daddb08f9547989f302722c5a57636d386dbfb. |
| npm.cmd run consumer:check | 0 | Standalone offline installed-package compatibility gate passed for the private artifact, public TypeScript host, compile, render, handoff, fan-in, and approval-bound verification. |
| npm.cmd run dogfood:v11 | 0 | Explicit committed evidence and source-freshness replay passed. |

## V11 Replay

- Candidate PASS: compilation sha256:ced8186898ebb27bac53e50e6b803c353766ae015464a2bae2b758cb6cf6cc36; package sha256:ddb642a474815b4ded464b40f5bd8225a404f610d3bd4a91d0ab2d43dc695f43; 6 selected agents; projected makespan 23; exact search over 203 candidates.
- Prelaunch audit PASS: compilation sha256:79c5a7103225b12398e27c0e959b993597f38dcc5ddca6d9750a4d2b62f2d065; package sha256:367d9b3d57b918aabc6543dae16b9b3cf5fee81338fd241226ef9bef2209510f; 2 selected agents; exact search over 2 candidates.
- Package verification receipt PASS: docs/specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/prelaunch-audit/package-verification-receipt.json, 2,255 bytes, sha256:7d859cd7ef8c069b08ff3ce569e29715322dcb7ae176b1e5f0607eb4f1c0664f.
- Launch authorization PASS. The replay checked committed evidence, checkout-canonical source freshness, current approval bindings, both package pairs, the receipt, and the exact audit handoff.
- First-run output independently reported 2/2 repository sources verified, exact search across 2 candidate teams, 5 rendered files, approval-bound package verification PASS, and zero runtime agents executed.

## Bounded Attempts

- A PowerShell nonce proof first failed parsing before execution because Windows PowerShell rejected the attempted generic SequenceEqual syntax: exit 1, no effect. The corrected proof then reached the intended write.
- The corrected nonce write was denied by the default sandbox at the declared cache path: exit 1. The exact cache-scoped operation was retried with host approval and passed.
- An initial Git status probe exited 0 but was denied access to an external global ignore path; no external bytes were returned. Later Git probes set GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=NUL, GIT_CONFIG_NOSYSTEM=1, GIT_ATTR_NOSYSTEM=1, and core.excludesFile=NUL.
- The first status-digest helper used an unavailable static SHA256.HashData API: exit 1, no writes. The SHA256.Create replacement passed.
- The checker matrix first failed because the default sandbox denied its authorized short-path workspace: exit 1. The exact command was retried with approval limited to .local/npm-cache and passed all 119 cases.
- The build first failed because the default sandbox denied authorized dist writes: exit 2. The exact command was retried with approval limited to dist and passed.
- The focused tests first reported 85 pass and 48 EPERM failures when the default sandbox denied authorized temporary workspaces: exit 1. The exact command was retried with approval limited to .local/npm-cache and passed 133/133.
- A post-gate in-memory handoff self-validation invocation failed during JavaScript parsing because of host argument quoting: exit 1, no writes. It did not rerun or affect any release gate or bound artifact.
- These bounded host and invocation failures produced no candidate defect and were superseded only by exact-scope retries or the final closed envelope.

## Mutation Proof

- Post-gate git diff --no-ext-diff --name-only returned zero paths. There were no tracked working-tree mutations, including outside dist. HEAD and branch were unchanged.
- The staged-status set grew from 312 to 313 paths because a concurrent host action staged docs/specs/v11-specialist-compiler/evidence/dogfood/handoffs/security-trace-review-pass-attempt-30.json while this specialist was running. This specialist did not read that handoff semantically or use it as a dependency input.
- Reauthentication proved every bound source and both allowed dependency files retained exact pre-gate bytes. No source, docs, evidence, handoff, metadata, or lockfile content was edited by this specialist.

## Outcome

PASS. Every owned release duty passed under the compiled authority, with exact candidate identity, contained temporary and cache roots, committed V11 freshness and approval/package evidence, independent package reconstruction, standalone package and consumer checks, and no unauthorized tracked mutation.

risks: A concurrent host action changed the staged-path count by adding one nondependency handoff; bound bytes, HEAD, branch, and the tracked working tree remained unchanged, and that handoff was not used.
